---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement for lu77U-MobileSec
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-discussion
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
Describe the problem or limitation you're experiencing. For example:
- "I'm always frustrated when..."
- "It's difficult to..."
- "Currently impossible to..."

## ✅ Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like:**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Implementation Ideas
If you have specific ideas about how this could be implemented:
- [ ] New CLI option/flag
- [ ] Additional analyzer component
- [ ] Integration with external tool
- [ ] AI/LLM enhancement
- [ ] Output format improvement
- [ ] Other: _____

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
**Describe alternatives you've considered:**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📱 Target Framework/Platform

**Which frameworks would this feature affect?**
- [ ] **Java/Kotlin** APKs
- [ ] **React Native** APKs  
- [ ] **Flutter** APKs
- [ ] **Cross-platform** (all frameworks)
- [ ] **Tool Infrastructure** (CLI, setup, etc.)
- [ ] **AI/Analysis Engine**
- [ ] **Dynamic Analysis** (MobSF integration)
- [ ] **Output/Reporting**
- [ ] **Other**: [specify]

## 🎯 Use Cases

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Security researchers
- [ ] Mobile app developers
- [ ] Penetration testers
- [ ] Security auditors
- [ ] Students/learners
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] Open source community

**Example scenarios:**
1. [Describe a specific use case]
2. [Describe another use case]
3. [Describe how it improves workflow]

## 📊 Impact Assessment

**What type of enhancement is this?**
- [ ] **Minor improvement** (small usability enhancement)
- [ ] **Major feature** (significant new functionality)
- [ ] **Breaking change** (would change existing behavior)
- [ ] **Performance improvement**
- [ ] **Security enhancement**
- [ ] **Developer experience** improvement

**Estimated complexity:**
- [ ] **Low** (small code change, existing patterns)
- [ ] **Medium** (new component, some research needed)
- [ ] **High** (major architectural change, significant development)
- [ ] **Uncertain** (needs investigation)

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

**Dependencies or requirements:**
- [ ] New external tools required
- [ ] Additional Python packages
- [ ] System-level dependencies
- [ ] Cloud service integrations
- [ ] Hardware requirements
- [ ] No additional dependencies

**Compatibility concerns:**
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained
- [ ] May require configuration migration
- [ ] Breaking change (needs major version bump)
- [ ] Platform-specific implementation needed

## 📝 Additional Context

**Supporting information:**
- Links to relevant documentation
- Examples from other tools
- Research papers or security advisories
- User feedback or community requests
- Screenshots or mockups (if applicable)

**Related issues:**
- Closes #___
- Related to #___
- Blocks #___

---

## 📋 Feature Request Checklist

Before submitting this feature request, please ensure:

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] This is not a bug report (use bug report template instead)
- [ ] I have provided clear use cases and benefits
- [ ] I have considered the implementation complexity
- [ ] I have not requested anything that would violate laws or ethics

---

## 🗳️ Community Input

**How important is this feature to you?**
- [ ] **Critical** - Blocking major workflow
- [ ] **High** - Would significantly improve productivity
- [ ] **Medium** - Nice to have enhancement
- [ ] **Low** - Minor convenience improvement

**Would you be willing to contribute to implementing this feature?**
- [ ] Yes, I can implement this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing and feedback
- [ ] Yes, I can help with documentation
- [ ] I'd like to contribute but need guidance
- [ ] I cannot contribute implementation but can provide feedback

---

**Thank you for helping improve lu77U-MobileSec! 🚀**

*Feature requests are discussed in our [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/sam-mg/lu77U-MobileSec/discussions) before implementation.*
